psake Task (simple).description: A minimal psake task with an inline action block.

psake Task (full).description: A psake task with Depends and Description parameters.

psake Task (no action).description: A psake task that only declares dependencies (no action block).

psake Properties.description: A psake Properties block for declaring shared build variables.

psake Include.description: Include another PowerShell script into the build.

psake Framework.description: Set the .NET framework version used for MSBuild.

psake FormatTaskName.description: Customize how task names are displayed when the build runs.

psake TaskSetup.description: A block that runs before each task.

psake TaskTearDown.description: A block that runs after each task.
